content: The 2018 Nobel Prize in Chemistry was awarded to Frances H. Arnold, George P. Smith, and Gregory P. Winter for their work on directed evolution of enzymes and phage display of peptides and antibodies.
raw_content: The 2018 Nobel Prize in Chemistry was awarded to Frances H. Arnold, George P. Smith, and Gregory P. Winter for their work on directed evolution of enzymes and phage display of peptides and antibodies.
